label: weather_ward3_2023
description: Hourly weather for the Ward 3 service-request centroid, 2023 analysis window. start_date is 2022-12-01 (31-day buffer) so the full 30-day freeze-thaw cycle lookback window is available for every day in January 2023.
latitude_source: mean LATITUDE of all Ward 3 service requests in All_Service_Requests_-_2023.csv
longitude_source: mean LONGITUDE of all Ward 3 service requests in All_Service_Requests_-_2023.csv
notes: latitude and longitude are computed at runtime and recorded in weather_cache/<label>_metadata.json alongside the parquet file.
